caption: A presentation slide titled "LF Networking 5G Super Blueprint" is displayed throughout the video. The slide contains the text "OPS-5G will align with the 5G Super Blueprint." and a technical architectural diagram featuring logos and labels such as "ORAN," "magma," "Anuket," and "NFVI (Edge/Cloud)." A small inset video in the top right corner shows a man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a dark shirt, speaking to the camera. At the bottom of the slide, a URL leads to a wiki page, and a footer reads "THE LINUX FOUNDATION © LF NETWORKING © LF EDGE DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A. Approved for public release. distribution unlimited." The hashtag "#opennetledge" is visible in the bottom left corner. There are no changes in the visual content across the frames; the speaker remains in the inset window and the slide remains static.
